provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring civilization, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, tall weathered reptilian alien with dark scales and a prominent crest bearing a ship-command seal cap, amber eyes that have navigated through hostile space, a thick steady tail, wearing practical dark leather shipboard clothes with bronze reinforcement at the shoulders and elbows rather than full ceremony armor, a navigation tool on a belt clip, a sidearm that looks more functional than ornamental, he commands a warship and dresses for the bridge not the arena
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

judgment.explanation: On-style gritty space costume. Faction-appropriate material vocabulary and wear level. Reads as a working person in a spacefaring civilization.
